dev.implementation_summary: Replaced the stale iteration-2 M5 allowlist regex in the Edge Cases section (line 120) of docs/dev/ticket-20260526-052559.md with the authoritative end-anchored no-arg regex from hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh:678 (_BULK_CANONICAL_RE). The stale form had no ^ start anchor, no $ end anchor, an optional double-venv group, and an unescaped dot in /root/.claude/. The authoritative form is fully anchored (^...$), has no optional group, and correctly escapes the dot. Technical Hints section (line 197) was not modified.

tasks_completed.description: Replace stale iteration-2 regex in Edge Cases section with authoritative anchored regex
tasks_completed.changes: Line 120: stale regex (no anchors, optional double-venv group, unescaped dot) replaced with ^source[[:space:]]+venv/bin/activate[[:space:]]*&&[[:space:]]*python3?[[:space:]]+/root/\.claude/scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel\.py$
